dublinCore.dc:title: 115 HR 6385 IH: Farm Transitions Act of 2025
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Davis of North Carolina (for himself and Mr. Nunn of Iowa) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 to reauthorize the Commission on Farm Transitions-Needs for 2050, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Farm Transitions Act of 2025.
Section 12609 of the Agriculture Improvement Act of 2018 (Public Law 115–334; 132 Stat. 5009) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by striking There is established and inserting Not later than 60 days after the date of the enactment of the Farm Transitions Act of 2025, the Secretary shall establish;

subparagraph.text: in the subsection heading, by inserting and recommendations after Study;
in the matter preceding paragraph (1), by inserting , and make recommendations relating to, after study on;

clause.text: in subparagraph (B), by inserting and timely after affordable; and
by striking subparagraph (D) and inserting the following:

subparagraph.text: apprenticeships, mentoring programs, business training, and technical assistance programs;

clause.text: in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking existing and new Federal tax policies and inserting existing and new State and Federal policies, including tax policies; and
in subparagraph (A), by inserting or impede after facilitate;

subparagraph.text: in paragraph (4), by striking and at the end;
in paragraph (5), by striking the period at the end and inserting a semicolon; and
by adding at the end the following:

paragraph.text: heirs’ property and succession of agricultural land;
any unique barriers faced by historically underserved and women farmers and ranchers in the ability to transfer, inherit, or purchase agricultural assets, including land; and
leasing and ownership trends, including leasing and ownership trends by foreign persons or entities.
in subsection (f), by striking 1 year after the date of enactment of this Act and inserting 2 years after the date of enactment of the Farm Transitions Act of 2025; and
in subsection (m), by striking 2023 and inserting 2029.
